4.3.1.1 TPipe Constructor
Function Usage
Constructs a TPipe object used to manage global memory and synchronization.
Prototype
__aicore__ inline TPipe()
Availability
Atlas Training Series Product
Precautions
● Do not create or initialize TPipe inside an object. If TPipe is created inside an
object, the optimization of constants in the object by the compiler may be
affected, causing scalar performance deterioration. For details, see Ascend C...
